description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office wear and for parties.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease.Heel: 1"UpperFabric footbed with a padded heel in synthetic leather and ergonomically curved for absolute comfort and styleSoft, supple plastic straps, wider on the medial side with a fabric strip and thinner on the lateral side, and has a toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a textured rubber padding below the heel for absolute grip even on smooth surfacesSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
